data.title: Rani Therapeutics to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Rani Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. revealed plans to disclose financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 on March 26, 2026, following market closure. Rani, traded as RANI on Nasdaq, is a biotherapeutics firm concentrating on orally administering biologics and drugs. The management will conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET.

data.title: Glass House Brands to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Earnings Call on March 24, 2026
data.description: Glass House Brands Inc., a leading cannabis company in the U.S., will release its financial results for Q4 and full year ending December 31, 2025, on March 24, 2026, after market close. The report will be followed by a conference call on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The company's stock tickers are CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U, CBOE CA: GLAS.WT.U, OTCQX: GLASF, and OTCQX: GHBWF.

data.title: LPL Financial Reports Monthly Activity for February 2026
data.description: On March 19, 2026, LPL Financial Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: LPLA) disclosed its February 2026 activity report.

data.title: Planet Labs Stock Drives Higher After Q4 Beats Estimates
data.description: In after-hours trading on Thursday, shares of Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL ) surged following the release of their fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported quarterly revenue of $86.82 million, exceeding the projected $78.53 million and showing growth from $61.55 million in the same period last year. Additionally, Planet Labs achieved a record annual revenue of $308 million. Details on their fiscal performance include an increase in RPOs and a promising outlook. Stay updated on the stock's movement to track the price action. For more information, access the full story on the situation at the stock on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Enzon Announces Extension of Exchange Offer Relating to Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock
data.description: Enzon Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has announced the extension of the expiration date for the exchange offer to holders of its Series C Non-Convertible Redeemable Preferred Stock. The offer allows holders to exchange their Series C Preferred Stock for shares of Enzon’s common stock. The new expiration date is set for March 24, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The original offer was extended to provide more time for participation in the exchange. This opportunity will now expire on the mentioned date unless further extension is granted.

data.title: Sono Group N.V. Announces Strategic Evolution: Adoption of Digital Asset Treasury Strategy and Exit from Legacy Solar Operations
data.description: The board has approved a transition plan for the company, aiming to achieve recurring cash flow generation and enhance long-term shareholder value by reducing ongoing operational losses. This strategic move is intended to pave the way for sustainable profitability and create a more lucrative future for investors.

data.title: A1R water and Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III Announce Upsizing of PIPE Investment to $83.5 Million
data.description: Today, in Miami, A1R water and Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III (Nasdaq: IPCX) revealed a notable extension of their previously mentioned PIPE, raising the total commitments to around $83.5 million. This expansion involves...

data.title: LOWE'S COMPANIES, INC. DECLARES CASH DIVIDEND
data.description: Lowe’s Companies, Inc. announced on March 19, 2026, that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $1.20 per share for shareholders of record as of April 22, 2026. The dividend will be paid on May 6, 2026. Lowe’s Companies, Inc. (NYSE: LOW) is a well-known retail company based in Mooresville, North Carolina, specializing in home improvement products.

data.title: WorkFusion, a UiPath company, Wins 2026 FinTech Breakthrough Award for AML Solution of the Year
data.description: A leading awards program is marking its tenth year of honoring the most innovative financial technology companies globally. In a press release dated March 19, 2026, WorkFusion, a UiPath Company known for its AI agents specialized in financial crime compliance, revealed that Tara, a recipient of the prestigious accolade...
FEDEX: TRANSFORMATION PROGRAMS MAY CUT ~5,000 OPERATIONAL EMPLOYEES
FEDEX: EXPECTS COMBINED PRE-TAX COSTS OF $225M-$325M FOR SEVERANCE, LEGAL FEES & FACILITIES EXIT COSTS

data.title: World Kinect Corporation Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Miami, the renowned World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) revealed today that their board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share. This dividend will be distributed on April 16, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such on March 30, 2026. World Kinect Corporation, based in Miami, Florida, operates as a global energy management entity, providing various services to clients in the aviation, marine, and land transportation industries.

data.title: Fresh Del Monte Completes Acquisition of Select Del Monte® Foods Assets
data.description: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (NYSE: FDP) based in Coral Gables, Florida has successfully finalized the purchase of specific assets from Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc. and its affiliated companies in California. The acquisition was completed for around $285 million. This transaction received approval from the United States Bankruptcy Court for the District of New Jersey under a court-supervised sale governed by Section 363 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code. The funding for this purchase will be provided through a designated method.

data.title: Generational Group Advises Sarasota Glass & Mirror in its Sale to All Glass & Windows, a Portfolio Company of Cross Rapids Capital LP
data.description: An advisory firm for privately held businesses, Generational Group, recently facilitated the acquisition of Sarasota Glass & Mirror by All Glass & Windows, a company under Cross Rapids Capital LP. The deal was finalized on February 12, 2026. Sarasota Glass & Mirror, headquartered in Sarasota, Florida, is renowned for providing top-tier glass and glazing services to both residential and commercial customers.

data.title: BURNING MAN PROJECT ANNOUNCES 75 ART HONORARIA PROJECTS
data.description: 75 projects hailing from 15 different countries are set to collaborate in turning Black Rock City into a collective work of global creativity in 2026. The ticket registration for this event will commence on April 20. Every year, the art of Black Rock City emerges from the desert landscape before vanishing without a mark, showcasing a unique blend of impermanence and artistic expression.

data.title: UDR Declares Quarterly Dividends
data.description: UDR, Inc., a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust, has disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly dividend for the first quarter of 2026. This dividend, set at $0.435 per share, will be paid in cash on April 30, 2026, to shareholders of UDR common stock who are recorded as of April 15, 2026. Notably, this upcoming dividend on April 30 will mark UDR's 214th consecutive quarterly dividend distribution on its common stock.

data.title: Urban Edge Properties Invites You to Join Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Urban Edge Properties extends an invitation to participate in its upcoming first quarter 2026 earnings conference call, set to take place in New York. This event will provide investors and stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance and outlook for the future. Details regarding the specific date, time, and access information for the call will be communicated in due course. Stay tuned for key updates on Urban Edge Properties' financial results and strategic direction for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: LTC to Participate in the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) revealed that senior management is slated to partake in the Deutsche Bank Healthcare REIT Summit on March 24, 2026, in New York. The Company's presentation materials will be accessible on the Investor Relations page of www.ltcreit.com. LTC Properties is a real estate investment trust specializing in seniors housing and health care properties, operating through SHOP.

data.title: Vesta Announces the Filing of Its Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: In Mexico City, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX) has released its latest financial report. The company filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025, with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on March 17, 2026. This report, known as the 2025 Annual Report, is now available for viewing on the SEC's website at www.sec.gov or on the SEC Filings section of Vesta's investor relations website.

data.title: TechnipFMC Announces First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: TechnipFMC (FTI) is set to conduct its Q1 2026 earnings conference call on April 30, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. London time (8:30 a.m. New York time). The results will be disclosed via a press release before the call at around 11:45 a.m. London time (6:45 a.m. New York time). Interested individuals can join the live webcast through the Investor Relations website or by registration. Additionally, a replay of the webcast will be accessible later.
